---
title: "Day 1: The 'Overture' and the Deming Story"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
knitr::knit_hooks$set(crop = knitr::hook_pdfcrop)

source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
```

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="15%"}
<div style="margin-top: 10px">
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
create_clock(9, 00)
```
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 30px">
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
create_clock(9, 30)
```
</div>
:::

::: {.column width="85%"}
<div style="margin-top: 10px">
**THE "OVERTURE"**
</div>

<div style="margin-top: 100px">
Why an "Overture"? (p 1); Deming (re)discovered (p 2)
<br>
"*Statistics?* Oh no!" (p 5)
</div>
:::

::::
